title: Ordering wall art: measure light, distance, and intent
description: Wall art ordering in Greece: sizing, lighting, preview before printing, delivery across Greece, and realistic turnaround.
bodyHtml:
Wall art works when it matches the room’s intent: accent vs atmosphere. Measure the wall, stand back, and sanity-check proportions. Pair with canvas print quality and portrait from a photo in Athens.

CTA

Start on ArtCanvas.gr.

faqs.question: Placement tips?
faqs.answer: Tape paper to the wall to preview scale.

faqs.question: How fast?
faqs.answer: Depends on queue and preview approval.

internalLinks.label: Portrait from a photo in Athens
